title: bupleurum angulosum var. pyrenaeum
intro: Bupleurum angulosum var. pyrenaeum, also known as Pyrenean hare's ear, is a perennial plant species in the family Apiaceae, native to the Pyrenees Mountains. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral activities, which have been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits associated with Bupleurum angulosum var. pyrenaeum include reduced inflammation, improved liver function, and enhanced immune system response, making it a popular choice in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are typically used in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being and balance.
